zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cranfield於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東時，他的父親William Glover Cranfield Sr.43歲，母親Katherine Dale Odell39歲。他於1554年與Joan Ratcliffe在英國賀特福爾蕾托 蒙登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1614年11月5日在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年90歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cranfield于大约1525年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東时，他的父亲William Glover Cranfield Sr.43岁，母亲Katherine Dale Odell39岁。他于1554年与Joan Ratcliffe在英国賀特福爾蕾托 蒙登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1614年11月5日在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年90岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

nameMeanings.name: Cranfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Bedfordshire named Cranfield, from Old English cran(uc) ‘crane’ + feld ‘open country’.

variants.name: Cranfill
meanings: English: probably a local (Cambridgeshire) variant of   Cranfield  . It is apparently no longer found in Britain. In the US, it is found mainly in NC, TX, and IN.

variants.name: Cornfield
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cranfield  .
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish or German   Kornfeld  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Cranfield was born about 1525, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Glover Cranfield Sr., was 43 and his mother, Katherine Dale Odell, was 39. He married Joan Ratcliffe in 1554, in Little Munden, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 November 1614, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cranfield est né environ 1525, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Glover Cranfield Sr., avait 43 ans et sa mère, Katherine Dale Odell, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Joan Ratcliffe en 1554, à Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1614, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cranfield um 1525 in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Glover Cranfield Sr. 43 und seine Mutter Katherine Dale Odell 39. Er hat 1554 in Little Munden, Hertfordshire, England Joan Ratcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. November 1614 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cranfield è nato il circa 1525 nel Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Glover Cranfield Sr., aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Dale Odell, aveva 39 anni. ja.lifeSummary: William Cranfieldが約1525年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで生まれた時，父William Glover Cranfield Sr.は43歳，母Katherine Dale Odellは39歳であった。1554年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ムンデンでJoan Ratcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1614年11月5日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで90歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Cranfield(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Glover Cranfield Sr.(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Dale Odell(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1554년 영국 허트퍼드실르 리틀 먼든에서 Joan Ratcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 11월 5일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cranfield nasceu aproximadamente 1525, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Glover Cranfield Sr., tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Dale Odell, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Ratcliffe em 1554, em Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1614, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cranfield родился около 1525 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Glover Cranfield Sr. было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Dale Odell, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Ratcliffe в 1554 г. в местности литл мунден, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 ноября 1614 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cranfield nació aproximadamente 1525, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Glover Cranfield Sr., tenía 43 años y su mamá, Katherine Dale Odell, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Joan Ratcliffe en 1554, en Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1614, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
